parameters.description: API version for install-config.yaml content. Current version is v1.

parameters.description: Base domain for cluster; used with metadata.name for routes. Full DNS name is <metadata.name>.<baseDomain>.

parameters.description: Kubernetes ObjectMeta; only name is consumed.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: Cluster name. DNS records are subdomains of {{.metadata.name}}.{{.baseDomain}}. Ignored in agent-config if set in install-config.

parameters.description: Configuration for the platform for installation.

parameters.description: Pull secret from Red Hat OpenShift Cluster Manager to authenticate image pulls from Quay.io etc.

parameters.description: Configuration for the cluster network. Cannot be changed after installation.

parameters.description: Red Hat OpenShift Networking network plugin. Default is OVNKubernetes.

parameters.description: IP address blocks for pods. Multiple blocks must not overlap.

parameters.description: IP address block for pods. IPv4 prefix 0-32, IPv6 0-128.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: Subnet prefix length per node. hostPrefix 23 gives 510 pod IPs per node.

parameters.description: IP address block for services. OVNKubernetes supports single block or dual-stack.

parameters.description: IP address blocks for machines. Must match CIDR of preferred NIC.

parameters.description: IP network block for machines in CIDR notation.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: IPv4 join subnet used internally by ovn-kubernetes. Must not overlap node network. Cannot change after install.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: PEM-encoded X.509 certificate bundle added to nodes' trust store; used when proxy is configured.

parameters.description: Policy for when to reference user-ca-bundle in Proxy trustedCA: Proxyonly when proxy configured, or Always. Optional.

parameters.description: Proxy URL for HTTPS connections outside the cluster.

citations.sectionHeading: 1.11.2. Configuring the cluster-wide proxy during installation

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of destinations to exclude from proxying. Prefix domain with . for subdomains only; use * to bypass proxy for all.

parameters.description: Controls installation of optional core cluster components.

parameters.description: Same as imageContentSources[].mirrors. One or more mirror registry URLs that may contain the same images (e.g. registry.example.com:5000/ocp4/openshift4).

parameters.description: Same as imageContentSources[].source. Source repository for release-image content (e.g. quay.io/openshift-release-dev/ocp-release). Required if imageDigestSources used.

citations.sectionHeading: 17.3.3. Reference specifications for the image-based-installation-config.yaml manifest

parameters.description: How to publish cluster endpoints (Kubernetes API, routes). Internal not supported on non-cloud.

parameters.description: API version for agent-config.yaml content. Current version is v1beta1.

parameters.description: Kubernetes ObjectMeta; only name is consumed.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: Cluster name. Value in agent-config is ignored; install-config value is used.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: IP of node that performs bootstrapping and runs assisted-service. Required if no host IP in networkConfig.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: For minimal ISO: URL to retrieve rootfs during install. For iPXE: URL of server for PXE assets.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: NTP sources added to all cluster hosts.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: Optional list of hosts. Count must not exceed compute.replicas + controlPlane.replicas.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: Overrides hostname from DHCP or reverse DNS. Each host must have unique hostname.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: Name and MAC address mappings for host interfaces. Required to match NetworkConfig if provided.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: Name of an interface on the host.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: MAC address of an interface on the host.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: Whether host is master or worker. If not set, roles assigned at random.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: Provision RHCOS to a particular device. First device matching hints is used.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: Name of device the RHCOS image is provisioned to.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer

parameters.description: Host network definition. Configuration must match the Host Network Management API defined in the nmstate documentation. Value: a dictionary of host network configuration objects. Supports interfaces (ethernet, bond, vlan), static IPs, DNS, and routes. See https://nmstate.io/examples.html for structure and examples.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer
NMState state examples

parameters.description: List of interfaces. Each entry: name, type (ethernet, bond, vlan), state (up, down, absent), optional mac-address, ipv4/ipv6, and for bond/vlan the relevant sub-fields. OpenShift 4.20 supports ethernet, bond, and vlan.

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer
NMState state examples

parameters.description: Interface name (e.g. eno1, eth0). Must match the actual NIC name on the host.

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Interface type. OpenShift 4.20 agent-config supports ethernet, bond, and vlan (VLANs and NIC bonds per Red Hat docs).

citations.docTitle: Installation configuration parameters for the Agent-based Installer
NMState state examples

parameters.description: Interface state: up, down, or absent (removes virtual interfaces).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Optional MAC address for interface matching (e.g. 00:ef:44:21:e6:a5).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: IPv4 configuration: enabled (bool), dhcp (bool), and optionally address array with ip and prefix-length for static IPs.

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Enable or disable IPv4 on the interface.

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Use DHCP for IPv4 when true; use static address when false.

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Static IPv4 addresses. Each element: ip (string), prefix-length (integer). Used when dhcp is false.

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Static IPv4 address (e.g. 192.168.111.80).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Subnet prefix length for the static IPv4 address (e.g. 23 or 24).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: IPv6 configuration: enabled, dhcp, autoconf, and optionally address array with ip and prefix-length for static IPv6.

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Enable or disable IPv6 on the interface.

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Static IPv6 addresses. Each element: ip (string), prefix-length (integer).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Bond (link-aggregation) configuration. Required when type is bond. Includes mode (e.g. balance-rr, active-backup), port (array of interface names), and optional options (e.g. miimon).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Slave interfaces for the bond (e.g. [eth2, eth3]).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Bond mode (e.g. balance-rr, active-backup).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: VLAN configuration. Required when type is vlan. base-iface: parent interface name; id: VLAN ID (integer).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Parent interface for the VLAN (e.g. eth1).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: VLAN ID (e.g. 101).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: DNS resolver configuration. config.server: array of DNS server IPs or hostnames; config.search: optional array of search domains.

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: DNS config: server (array of DNS servers), search (array of search domains).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: List of DNS servers (e.g. [192.168.111.1]).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: DNS search domains (e.g. [example.com]).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Static routes. config: array of route entries with destination, next-hop-address, next-hop-interface, optional metric, table-id.

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: List of static routes. Each entry: destination (CIDR), next-hop-address, next-hop-interface, optional metric, table-id (e.g. 254 for main table).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Route destination in CIDR notation (e.g. 0.0.0.0/0 for default route).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Next-hop gateway address. Must be in same subnet as the interface IP.

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Interface for the next hop (e.g. eno1).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Optional route metric.

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: Routing table ID. Use 254 for the main table (e.g. default route).

citations.docTitle: NMState state examples

parameters.description: If true, generate minimal ISO (no rootfs; pull from bootArtifactsBaseURL). Default false.
